raw_consumer_statement: I made a {$580.00} on XX/XX/scrub>XXXX  with XXXX  online. I never received my purchase. I reached out to XXXX  first they did an investigation with the delivery company which was UPS. Ups said they delivered it. So XXXX  told me I have to do a dispute with UPS they said they delivered it. I didnt an appeal. I never heard or got anything back from them. I contacted XXXX  again and they said its nothing they can do but refund me {$66.00} and {$65.00} for some ink and drill that I never received either I purchase all 3 items together. I said I would have to contact my credit card company to do a dispute. I done so they credit me my money back and then later reversed it.
